content: RDFLib latest 7.6.0 (2026-02-13). OWL-RL (owlrl package, latest 7.6.2, 2026-07-08) implements only the OWL 2 RL profile plus basic RDFS via forward chaining, pure Python. It is NOT a complete OWL 2 DL reasoner — cannot do full class satisfiability/TBox consistency checking that HermiT/Pellet provide; suitable only as a lightweight complement or for RL-expressible ontologies.
